title: Birthday Breakfast
synopsis: A family prepares a simple but special breakfast for a birthday surprise.
sentences: It was Max's birthday, and he woke up before the sun was fully up.
He heard soft sounds in the kitchen and wondered what was happening.
When he opened his bedroom door, his little sister told him to close his eyes.
She led him carefully to the dining table.
When Max opened his eyes, he saw pancakes, fruit, and a small candle in the middle.
His parents sang quietly so they would not wake the neighbors.
Max laughed when his sister clapped too early.
There was also a handmade card with bright stars on the front.
Max blew out the candle and made a secret wish.
The pancakes were warm, and the strawberries were sweet.
Before school, the whole family sat together a little longer than usual.
Max thought it was the perfect way to begin a birthday.
